task_completion.description: Log in to NOSH as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: NOSH EMR dashboard or interface is visible, indicating successful login as admin.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Address Book to add an Insurance Payer

task_completion.description: Enter the payer's name and address details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with Name: 'Aetna Better Health', Address: 'PO Box 982960', City: 'El Paso', State: 'TX', and Zip: '79998'.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with Phone: '800-306-0337' and Fax: '860-555-0199'.
The Payer ID field or Comments/Notes field contains '60054'.

task_completion.description: Save the new Insurance Payer entry
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification is visible, or 'Aetna Better Health' is shown as a saved entry in the Address Book's list of Insurance Payers.

integrity.description: Agent used the NOSH graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the NOSH web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The information is entered into the actual NOSH application fields, not a notepad or text editor.
The final screenshots show the saved record or a success message, rather than just an unsubmitted form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Aetna Better Health is a real health insurance company. The verified mailing address is PO Box 982960, El Paso, TX 79998. The universal payer ID is 60054. The phone and fax numbers provided in the task are synthetic/unverified but must be entered exactly as requested.
